choices: On Her Bed While She Is Sleeping
1.content:
You are Jack, a 13 year old orphan who lives in a careless orphanage.

Jack is a massive fan of the actress Rosario Dawson who was in such films as Death Proof, Sin City and tv shows like Daredevil and The Mandalorian You love everything about her, her dark hair, her personality, her glowing brown skin and body, her beautifully sculpted legs and of course HER FEET (you have a foot fetish)

You wish you can leave this place and be with Rosario Dawson. One night you are actually desperate enough to wish on a star and wish that you can be with her and you don’t care how (even though you should).

The next morning you wake up in a strange envoirmemt....
